title: selaginella kivuensis
intro: Selaginella kivuensis, also known as the Kivu spikemoss, is a species of vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, which can contribute to various health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and immune system function. In traditional medicine, Selaginella kivuensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion to treat conditions like fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it may also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations. Further research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits and optimal herbal preparations of Selaginella kivuensis.
